projetos.descricaoResumida: Automation project to generate product barcodes. Creates a docx with all codes ready for printing.
projetos.descricaoCompleta: This automation project was developed to generate barcodes for products. It was created to solve the problem of unreadable or hard-to-access codes for employees. The operation is simple: the user types the codes and, once finished, the program creates a docx on the desktop with all the codes ready for printing.

projetos.descricaoResumida: Query CNPJs with the Brazilian Federal Revenue API and return useful data for accounting.
projetos.descricaoCompleta: Code written in Python that queries the Brazilian Federal Revenue API to obtain company data. Since the API only allows 3 CNPJ queries per minute for free, I implemented a timer that makes the program perform 3 queries, wait the required time, and then make another three queries until the last CNPJ in the file. In the end, data such as company name, city, state, and other information is returned. The API is public and allows selecting different pieces of information as needed.

projetos.descricaoResumida: Query the Google Maps API to calculate the distance between cities in Brazil.
projetos.descricaoCompleta: Calculates the distance from one city to another and from a city to all other cities in Brazil provided by the Google Maps API. Developed in Python with a simple, yet responsive, interface created with Tkinter.

projetos.descricaoResumida: Website with information about food, macronutrient calculator, and nutritionist contact.
projetos.descricaoCompleta: The 'Nutritional Information' project is a website developed with the aim of promoting awareness about the importance of healthy eating and offering practical tools to help users make nutritional choices. It was developed as part of an extension project at the university.

projetos.descricaoResumida: 2D arcade game developed in Python using Pygame with scores saved in SQLite3.
projetos.descricaoCompleta: Soldiers vs Zombies is a 2D arcade game developed with Pygame. The game features 2 phases, each ending with a time-out event. It can be played in cooperative mode (2 players). The score is saved in a SQLite3 database.

projetos.descricaoResumida: Desktop application to query information about products and open credit cards.
projetos.descricaoCompleta: This project is a desktop application that allows querying information about products and open credit cards for the company where I work. Developed using Electron for the frontend and Flask for the backend, the application accesses data stored in a PostgreSQL database. The graphical interface was built with HTML, CSS, and JavaScript.

projetos.descricaoResumida: Real-time camera monitoring system to detect trucks.
projetos.descricaoCompleta: This project is a real-time camera monitoring system designed to detect trucks using the YOLOv8 model. The system connects to an RTSP camera feed and processes video frames to identify trucks in specific monitored areas. It is currently trained to detect trucks in general, with ongoing efforts to specialize in detecting tanker trucks. The application saves images and logs detections with timestamps for future analysis.
